name: Dirt Cake/Slp
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Cream-filled chocolate sandwich cookies (e.g., Oreo)
2 packages Instant pudding mix, French vanilla flavor (for 4 servings)
8 oz Frozen non-dairy whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch, 1/1/1990
1. Crush the cookies in a large plastic bag using a rolling pin or food processor. Set aside.
2. Cream together butter, cream cheese, and confectioner's sugar in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, mix milk, instant pudding mix, and thawed whipped topping until well combined.
4. Combine the two mixtures and stir until smooth.
5. Line a clean flowerpot (see note) with plastic wrap or aluminum foil.
6. Fill the pot with alternating layers of cookie crumbs and pudding mixture, starting and ending with cookie crumbs.
7. Cover the top of the pot with foil or plastic wrap.
8. Freeze the cake for at least 4 hours before serving.
9. Before serving, insert a flower in the middle of the cake. Place a few gummy worms on top for decoration.
10. Use a trowel to serve the cake. Yield: 10 to 12 servings.
Note: An 8-inch flowerpot is too big, but a 6-inch pot is too small. A suggestion is to turn a saucer upside down in the bottom of an 8-inch pot before lining the pot with plastic wrap.
